scope.target: Canonical AI-context evidence and optional-tool boundary
constraints: Do not make Codebase Memory MCP or any other external graph tool mandatory.
Require deterministic fallback verification for tool omissions and unsupported relationships.
Exclude product source and tests from AI-context audit scope.
non_goals: Implement the standalone assessment storage proposal.

steps: Inventory current skill evidence and tool-routing rules.
Define the canonical tool-neutral evidence contract.
validation: Verify the contract does not name one optional tool as mandatory.
Verify every known omission has a direct fallback check.
execution.last_completed_step: Workflow initialized from live MCP capability evidence.
execution.next_action: Inspect canonical AI-context skill specs and references.
